## Automated Tests Required

### E4-005 Universal Combo Effects (7) — Logic (CRITICAL)

**Test file path**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Combo/UniversalEffects/` — one test file per effect

| Effect | Key Assertions |
|--------|----------------|
| BerserkersFury | Kill streak of 5 → +10% move speed for 3s. Streak resets on damage. Buff stacks additively. |
| Ironclad | Below 30% HP → defense doubled. Above 30% → modifier removed. Threshold crossing both directions. |
| GoldRush | Kill proc at 10% → bonus currency 3x. Deterministic at 1.0/0.0. |
| **ElementalStorm** | Target with Burn+Freeze → 30% bonus damage. **5-hit cap per target (G-009)**. Reset when status drops. Dictionary cleanup in Deactivate. |
| VampiricStrikes | Burn-killed enemy → heal player 5% of enemy max HP. Non-burn kill → no heal. |
| GaleForce | Passive move speed + attack speed buff. Modifiers removed on Deactivate. |
| **Executioner** | Slowed enemy below 25% HP → instant kill. **Boss-immune via EnemyData.IsBoss** (F-007). Boss at 1% HP + Slowed → NOT killed. |

**CRITICAL tests** (non-negotiable before merge):
- Executioner: `IsBoss = true` + slowed + below threshold → NO kill
- Executioner: `IsBoss = false` + slowed + below threshold → instant kill
- Executioner: above threshold → no kill regardless
- ElementalStorm: hit count reaches 5 → bonus stops
- ElementalStorm: only one status active → no bonus (both required)
- ElementalStorm: Deactivate clears `_hitCounts` dictionary

**Cross-effect rules (all 7):**
- Activate/Deactivate can run twice without double-subscribe
- No heap allocation in OnTrigger (no lambdas, closures, LINQ)
- Deactivate when never Activated → no exception

**Estimated test count**: ~28 unit tests (4 per effect)

---

### E3-006 Shield Phase Ability — Logic

**Test file path**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Boss/ShieldPhaseAbilityTest.cs`
**What to test**:
- Activate with 4 hits → deal damage 4 times → shield breaks on 4th
- During shield: apply Freeze → boss IS frozen (status effects pass through)
- During shield: deal damage → boss HP unchanged (damage blocked)
- Hit counter scaling: phase 0 = `_baseShieldHits` (4), phase 2 = 4 + (2 * 2) = 8
- Each hit = 1 count regardless of damage amount (100 damage = 1 hit)
- Shield VFX spawned on activate, destroyed on break
- `_bossAttacksDuringShield = false` → boss stops attacking

**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests

---

### E3-007 Rain of Fire Ability — Logic (Should Have)

**Test file path**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Boss/RainOfFireAbilityTest.cs`
**What to test**:
- Spawns `_circleCount` (default 4) AoE circles within spawn radius
- Telegraph duration = `_telegraphDuration` (1.0s) before explosion
- Damage = `boss.Attack * _damageMultiplier` per overlapping circle
- Player in multiple circles takes multiple hits
- At least one safe zone exists (no full-area coverage)
- `_applyBurnStatus = true` → Burn status applied on hit
- BT action node returns Running during telegraph, Success after

**Estimated test count**: ~5 unit tests

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### E4-007 ComboDatabase Population — Config/Data

**Verification method**: Inspector spot-check + Play-mode smoke
**Evidence to capture**: noted in smoke-check report

Checklist:
- [ ] ComboDatabase.asset contains exactly 18 ComboDefinition entries
- [ ] Each entry has non-null skillA and skillB references
- [ ] Each entry has non-null triggerEffect reference
- [ ] ComboCategory matches: 5 Mage, 6 Archer, 7 Universal
- [ ] TriggerCondition matches GDD spec per combo
- [ ] comboName matches GDD name exactly (used in discovery flash)
- [ ] In Play mode: draft combo pair → effect fires + "Combo Name" flashes

### PT-001 New-Player Experience Playtest — Playtest

**Verification method**: Playtest session with external participant
**Evidence to capture**: `production/playtests/new-player-2026-05-XX.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Participant has never seen Trizzle before
- [ ] Can articulate "what is this game" after 2 minutes of play
- [ ] Understands the draft/combo system without being told
- [ ] Notes any confusion points, stuck moments, or "what do I do?" reactions
- [ ] At least 1 session documented

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off for Sprint 6:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. New game → Normal difficulty → first run reaches wave 1
3. **New for Sprint 6**: Draft 2 Universal-combo skills → effect fires (E4-005)
4. **New for Sprint 6**: Executioner does NOT instant-kill boss (critical safety check)
5. **New for Sprint 6**: ElementalStorm bonus stops after 5 hits (G-009)
6. **New for Sprint 6**: Shield Phase activates on boss, blocks damage, breaks after N hits (E3-006)
7. **New for Sprint 6**: All 18 combos discoverable via draft in ComboDatabase (E4-007)
8. Existing combo effects (Mage 5 + Archer 6) still fire — regression gate
9. Combo discovery gold flash still appears — regression gate (E4-006)
10. Frame time during combo-active gameplay within 16.6 ms budget

## Entry / Exit Criteria

**Entry** (must be true before sprint implementation begins):
- [x] ADR-0003 status = `Accepted`
- [x] ADR-0004 status = E3-001 through E3-005 complete (boss foundation)
- [x] Sprint 5 QA sign-off: APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS
- [x] E4-001 through E4-004 complete (combo base + Mage + Archer effects)

**Exit** (sprint QA cycle complete):
- [ ] All Must Have stories have passing unit tests (E4-005, E3-006) or manual evidence (E4-007)
- [ ] Executioner boss-immunity verified (F-007 compliance)
- [ ] ElementalStorm 5-hit cap verified (G-009 compliance)
- [ ] All 18 combos wired in ComboDatabase.asset (E4-007)
- [ ] `production/qa/smoke-2026-05-XX.md` exists with verdict PASS
- [ ] `production/qa/qa-signoff-sprint-06-2026-05-XX.md` exists with APPROVED or APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS
- [ ] No S1 or S2 bugs

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 6

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Config/Data stories (E4-007)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced — existing 70+ tests + Sprint 5 Archer tests still pass
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or `/review`)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] `production/sprint-status.yaml` reflects story's status

---

## Next Steps

1. Run `/story-readiness` on E4-005 or E3-006 before starting implementation
2. `/dev-story` per story in critical-path order (E4-005 first — longest, unblocks E4-007)
3. `/smoke-check sprint` after all Must Have stories complete
4. `/team-qa sprint` to execute this plan and produce the sign-off report
